prompt: Create a vertical anime-style portrait of an androgynous young adult with pale skin, messy layered glossy black hair with sharp white highlights, and striking golden amber eyes. The character wears a sleek black tailored suit jacket with a crisp white dress shirt and black tie, rendered with dramatic high-contrast ink shadows and shiny folds. Pose the character from mid-thigh upward, body angled slightly left, one hand resting on the hip and the other hand holding a white-and-gray megaphone near the right side of the face, cropped partly at the image edge. Give them a calm, confident, faintly smiling expression while looking toward the viewer. Use a flat vivid yellow background with no text, no logos, and no extra objects. Style: modern manga illustration, clean line art, monochrome clothing with blue-gray shading, sharp highlights, detailed tousled hair strands, elegant proportions, polished editorial poster composition, vertical 9:16 framing.
promptEn: Create a vertical anime-style portrait of an androgynous young adult with pale skin, messy layered glossy black hair with sharp white highlights, and striking golden amber eyes. The character wears a sleek black tailored suit jacket with a crisp white dress shirt and black tie, rendered with dramatic high-contrast ink shadows and shiny folds. Pose the character from mid-thigh upward, body angled slightly left, one hand resting on the hip and the other hand holding a white-and-gray megaphone near the right side of the face, cropped partly at the image edge. Give them a calm, confident, faintly smiling expression while looking toward the viewer. Use a flat vivid yellow background with no text, no logos, and no extra objects. Style: modern manga illustration, clean line art, monochrome clothing with blue-gray shading, sharp highlights, detailed tousled hair strands, elegant proportions, polished editorial poster composition, vertical 9:16 framing.
promptZh: 创作一张竖版动漫风格肖像，主角为一位肤色苍白的中性化年轻人，留着凌乱的层次感 亮黑色 头发，带有锐利的白色高光，拥有一双迷人的 金琥珀色 眼睛。角色身着利落的 黑色定制西装外套，内搭挺括的白色衬衫和黑色领带，通过戏剧性的高对比度墨水阴影和光泽褶皱进行渲染。角色姿势为大腿中部以上，身体略微向左倾斜，一只手叉腰，另一只手在脸部右侧附近拿着一个白灰相间的扩音器，部分画面在边缘处裁切。角色表情冷静、自信，带着淡淡的微笑，注视着观众。使用平面的鲜艳 黄色 背景，无文字、无标志、无额外物体。风格：现代漫画插画、干净的线条艺术、单色服装配蓝灰色阴影、锐利的高光、细节丰富的凌乱发丝、优雅的比例、精致的编辑海报构图、竖版 9:16 画幅。
